---
name: Security hardening
about: Track a security, privacy, policy, or data-safety improvement
title: "[Security] "
labels: ["security", "privacy"]
assignees: ""
---

## Risk

Describe the risk and affected boundary.

## Expected Control

What should prevent abuse or leakage?

## Data Sensitivity

Does this involve raw identifiers, payloads, images, HMAC tokens, exports, or
biometric data?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest safe change.

## Verification

List tests, policy checks, migrations, or manual verification required.
